title: MicrobeQAExtractor
author: Wang, Wenjun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository provides the MicrobeDB question-answering dataset, the pathogenic microorganism knowledge extraction code, and the trained model weights. These resources are generated during the study  Interpretation knowledge extraction for genetic testing via question-answer model . For more details, please refer to the README.md file in the "Files" section.
steps_raw: This repository provides the MicrobeDB question-answering dataset, the pathogenic microorganism knowledge extraction code, and the trained model weights. These resources are generated during the study  Interpretation knowledge extraction for genetic testing via question-answer model . For more details, please refer to the README.md file in the "Files" section.
